content: Would it in theory be possible to check if rustc +1.68.2 --version works, and use it if so? So even if you have more than one version on your system, it will use the correct one if available
not sure if I understand what you mean, but you can set an override in rustup for certain directories, see https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/blob/rust-next/Documentation/rust/quick-start.rst
I did not know that override was a single-directory solution. Thank you, that's a lot nicer than I thought.
